Hi, I'm Aditya
Developer

Full-stack developer, game developer, software developer, 3D artist, app developer (because I get bored learning just one thing) and a student at IIT Madras.

About Me

Multi-disciplinary developer who builds across every platform.

Full-stack developer, game dev, mobile app dev, and 3D artist with 5+ years of experience. Currently pursuing a BS in Data Science from IIT Madras.

I build frameworks first, then craft pages — prioritizing smooth UX with minimal bugs. I bring leadership, critical thinking, and public speaking to every team.

Projects

Things I've built.

Active

United Earth Labs

A startup focused on innovating human technology to accelerate our path toward becoming a Type 1 civilization on the Kardashev scale.

StartupDeep TechInnovation
Archived

FaceReco

A surveillance software capable of detecting and cross-referencing leaked information. Discontinued due to high risk of misuse.

PythonOpenCVDeep Learning

Terminal Academy

A free-to-use platform where students can learn tech — no paywalls, no barriers. Education should be accessible to everyone.

Next.jsTypeScriptTailwind CSS

RightWrongCounter

A simple counter app built out of necessity — couldn't find the one I needed, so I made my own.

ReactJavaScript

Game Collection

Multiple games built from scratch because I couldn't find the games I wanted to play. If it doesn't exist, build it.

UnityC#Game Design

3D Models & Renders

A collection of 3D models, animations, and photorealistic renders created across various personal and creative projects.

Blender3D ArtAnimation
